violations.text: The Sink & Surface Sanitizer concentration used as a sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the Sink & Surface Sanitizer must be between 272 - 700 ppm. At the time of inspection, the sanitizer container was switched for a new container. The Sanitizer Solution was retested and observed between 272 - 700 ppm as required. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Wine/Tomato/Saphron sauce was observed held beyond 7 days from the date of preparation marked on the container. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation and held for no longer than 7 days unless frozen. Sauce was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dining room adjacent to the kitchen entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

At the time of inspection, the 2 bay sink used for mop sink/prep sink was observed to be lacking a splash guard preventing possible contamination of the food prep sink side during times of use for dumping mop water. Splash guard is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Wood is used in the construction of sink and bar bracing in the dish and bar areas. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed/sealed with a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

The Kitchen Walk-In Cooler door threshold was observed to be in need of repair. The edge of the threshold is worn/in poor repair not allowing for proper sealing of the walk-in door. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

At the time of inspection, hot water was not available at the hand sinks. Handwashing sink(s) shall be equipped to provide water at a temperature of at least 100 degrees Fahrenheit through a mixing valve or combination faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

The Kitchen door to the outside is not tight-fitting (worn/missing weather stripping). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

At the time of inspection, the 2 bay sink used for mop sink/prep sink was observed to be lacking a splash guard preventing possible contamination of the food prep sink side during times of use for dumping mop water. Splash guard is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

At the time of inspection, hot water was not available at the dish machine. The temperature of the wash solution in spray-type warewashers that use chemicals to SANITIZE may not be less than 120 Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

The Kitchen door to the outside is not tight-fitting (worn/missing weather stripping). Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024

At the time of inspection, the 2 bay sink used for mop sink/prep sink was observed to be lacking a splash guard preventing possible contamination of the food prep sink side during times of use for dumping mop water. Splash guard is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2024
